python -c 
import urllib.request, os, sys

# Try Wiley direct PDF URL for OA articles
urls_to_try = [
    'https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/pdfdirect/10.1113/jphysiol.2008.161240',
    'https://physoc.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/pdfdirect/10.1113/jphysiol.2008.161240',
    'https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC2669973/pdf/tjp0587-0819.pdf',
]

headers = {
    'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (compatible; research bot; mailto:a.nikolaev@sheffield.ac.uk)',
    'Accept': 'application/pdf,*/*',
}

for url in urls_to_try:
    try:
        req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers=headers)
        with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=30) as resp:
            content_type = resp.headers.get('Content-Type', '')
            first_bytes = resp.read(8)
            print(f'URL: {url}')
            print(f'Status: {resp.status}')
            print(f'Content-Type: {content_type}')
            print(f'First bytes: {first_bytes}')
            print(f'Is PDF: {first_bytes[:4] == b"%PDF"}')
            print()
    except Exception as e:
        print(f'URL: {url}')
        print(f'Error: {e}')
        print()
